## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New tool (adds a new MCP tool for a WooCommerce entity)
- [ ] Enhancement (improves an existing tool or feature)
- [ ] New resource or prompt
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] CI/CD or infrastructure

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] New tools follow existing patterns (field filtering, error handling, annotations)
- [ ] Tool descriptions include "WooCommerce" and entity name
- [ ] Tool annotations set (`readOnlyHint`, `destructiveHint`, `idempotentHint` as appropriate)
- [ ] `schema-validation.test.ts` updated if new tools added
- [ ] CONTRIBUTING.md reviewed for relevant conventions
